title: Bauer 2200W Ion FlowX Hair Dryer/Professional Ionic Hairdryer with 2 Speeds and 3 Heat Settings Including Cool Shot and Concentrator Nozzle/Foldable and Compact for Travel 38099
features: ADVANCED IONIC TECHNOLOGY - Engineered to help lock in moisture and reduce static and frizz, this Ion FlowX Hair Dryer uses ionic conditioning to help you achieve a smooth and shiny blow-dry with each use.

COMPACT AND FOLDABLE DESIGN - Designed with portability in mind, this dryer's foldable handle and light build make it perfect for travel, gym bags, or small storage spaces, so you can style effortlessly wherever you are.

CONCENTRATOR NOZZLE & COOL FUNCTION - Take full control of your blow-dry with the concentrator nozzle, allowing for targeted airflow to shape and perfect your look. The hairdryer’s built-in cooling function sets your style and helps to add a glossy finish for salon-quality results.

VERSATILE SPEED & HEAT SETTINGS - With 3 heat settings and 2 speed options, you can easily adjust the airflow to suit your hair type and desired finish. From quick drying to precise styling, this 2200W hairdryer delivers consistent results every time.

BAUER PROFESSIONAL - Bauer Professional is the leading manufacturer of salon quality hair products, as well as beauty and personal care products for both men and women. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description Previous page Style Your Way Select from adjustable speed settings and heat levels. Foldable Design Makes it perfect for travel, gym bags, or small storage spaces.
